runs.text: Check out Hubspot's free Newsletter report here →
Check out  my Productivity System LifeOS →

MY PRODUCTIVITY APPS
👻 VoicePal: AI Writing App (iOS/Android) - Download for Free →

MY BOOK
📕 My New York Times bestselling book Feel-Good Productivity (2,000+ 5-star reviews)

MY COURSES
🧠 My Productivity System: LifeOS →

CONNECT WITH ME 
💌 Join LifeNotes, my weekly email where I share what I’m reading & learning:

------------
These are the stupidly simple 5 steps that I'm going to be following to help me achieve my goals in 2025. I hope they help you too! Enjoy xx

🔗 PAPERS REFERENCED IN THIS VIDEO:

description.content: Join LifeNotes, my free weekly (ish) email newsletter where I share what I’m reading and what I’ve learned in the worlds of productivity, business and life.

accessibilityContext.label: Description. Join LifeNotes, my free weekly (ish) email newsletter where ...tap for more.

title.simpleText: Ali Abdaal
Ali Abdaal

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Ali Abdaal
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Join LifeNotes, my free weekly (ish) email newsletter where I share what I’m reading and what I’ve learned in the worlds of productivity, business and life.

Hey, I'm Ali, a doctor turned entrepreneur, and the world’s most-followed productivity expert 😜 

On this channel, we explore evidence-based strategies and tools that can help us be more productive, and build a life that we love. 

If that sounds interesting, consider subscribing! See you in the next video x
